description: pendingWorktreeId must remain pending setup until the real thread, worktree, branch, and ledger setup are confirmed.

files.docs/reviews/local-transcript-pending-ru: Sanitized transcript fixture: create_thread returned pendingWorktreeId pwt_456, and the orchestrator counted pwt_456 as a running worker immediately before setup is confirmed, with no real thread id, no worktree path, and no branch.
